sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65818" key="melamei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελαμ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n65818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sanctuary of Melampus</tr_> at Aegosthena, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">207</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">208</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
